title: Ordering at a Western Restaurant 西餐厅点餐
scene: Tom和Lily在西餐厅看菜单点菜。

lines.en: Welcome to Star Restaurant. Here is the menu.
lines.zh: 欢迎来到星级餐厅。这是菜单。

lines.en: Thank you. What do you recommend?
The steak is very popular here.
Sounds great. I would like a steak, please.
lines.zh: 听起来不错。我想要一份牛排。

lines.en: How would you like it cooked?
Medium, please. And a glass of orange juice.
Would you like a salad or soup to start?
lines.zh: 你想先来份沙拉还是汤？

lines.en: OK. Your order will be ready soon.
